creative_direction.reasoning: The ad is 95% photograph — an overhead action shot of Sloane Stephens mid-serve on a tennis court, with an editorial quote floating in the top-right negative space. The photograph IS the ad; the quote is typography over natural negative space. Image-gen must produce the overhead-photography composition with correct subject proportions and court coloring. Track B recommended for quote text accuracy.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Editorial overhead sports photograph of an elite athlete, with a humble testimonial quote floating in the court's green negative space.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full editorial photograph with quote typography baked in.

nano_banana_json.scene: Editorial sports photograph, overhead/high-angle view of a Black professional female tennis player mid-serve on a green tennis court, with a quote in white editorial serif type floating in the upper-right corner of the frame.

subject.description: A young Black woman, professional tennis player, caught mid-serve motion
subject.pose: body rotated slightly, right arm extended high holding a tennis racket overhead (racket pointing upper-right, strings visible), left arm counterbalancing down and slightly forward, head tilted up looking toward the raised racket (gaze line points up-right toward the quote zone)
subject.wardrobe: pale aqua/turquoise (#A8D8D0) sleeveless athletic dress/tank, subtle vertical pleat details; ponytail of dark hair visible
subject.skin: rich dark brown skin tone, realistic, visible muscle definition in shoulders and arms from the extension
subject.position_in_frame: centered vertically, occupying the left 60% of frame width; body axis angled slightly from lower-left toward upper-right

environment.location: professional tennis court, playing surface visible
environment.court_surface: saturated muted tennis-court green (~#2A6A3E), plain, no line markings visible in this close crop, slight natural texture of hard court

camera.angle: high angle / overhead — shot from 30-45° above the player looking down
camera.distance: medium-tight, filling frame with player's upper body + raised racket
camera.framing: 1:1, player occupies left 60%, upper-right corner is empty court green for the quote

lighting.key_light: bright outdoor natural daylight from upper-front, strong directional but softened
lighting.mood: mid-afternoon match intensity, but visually calm
lighting.shadows: short natural shadows on skin/dress from overhead light

composition.layout_archetype: editorial rule-of-thirds sports portrait with negative-space quote
composition.eye_flow: viewer enters at player's face, follows extended arm up-right toward racket, lands on quote

style_directives: editorial sports photography, magazine-grade (reference: Nike 'You Can't Stop Us', Lululemon, Annie Leibovitz sports portraits)
NOT stock photography; not social media UGC
athlete appears focused, not posing for camera
no tournament branding or sponsor overlays visible

text_elements_in_image.content:
"AG1 is one of those
little things that helps
me feel grounded and
perform my best."
text_elements_in_image.font: Editorial high-contrast serif (Canela / Tiempos Italic for emphasis lines)
text_elements_in_image.position: upper-right, text block starts at x:50%, y:8% and flows down-right
text_elements_in_image.italic_emphasis: italicize 'feel grounded and perform my best' only

text_elements_in_image.content:
Sloane S.
US Open Winner
Real AG1 Member
text_elements_in_image.font: Clean sans — line 1 SemiBold, line 2 Regular (spec: italic), line 3 Italic

negative_prompt: no AG1 product visible in frame (intentional)
no visible logos on clothing or racket
no text outlines or drop shadows on quote
no saturated green (must be muted court-hardcourt shade)
no hip-level shot — MUST be overhead/high-angle
no bright white clothing — aqua only

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate the overhead tennis photograph only — no quote text. Quote and attribution composited in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Editorial overhead sports photograph: a Black female professional tennis player mid-serve, shot from 30-45° above, player in aqua sleeveless athletic dress, right arm extended holding racket up-right, head tilted up. Court surface is muted green (#2A6A3E) covering ~55% of frame. Upper-right quadrant is empty green court space (negative space for overlaid text).
nano_banana_json.subject: Black female tennis player, mid-serve motion, aqua athletic dress, hair in ponytail, racket raised up-right, gaze up-right

lighting.style: natural outdoor daylight, mid-afternoon, overhead directional with soft fill

elements.content: "AG1 is one of those little things that helps me feel grounded and perform my best."
italic_substrings: feel grounded and perform my best

elements.content:
Sloane S.
US Open Winner

assets.name: no brand assets visible (deliberate)
assets.fidelity_confidence: n/a — the ad intentionally contains no AG1 logo or product

patterns_exemplified: C4 cast the audience (elite athlete variant)
prompt_writer_training_notes: This ad demonstrates the hardest prompt pattern: get the pose right. Image gen struggles with 'mid-serve tennis motion' — must specify racket angle (pointing up-right), arm extension (right high, left counterbalance), and body rotation. Specify high-angle/overhead explicitly or default is shoulder-height. Skin tone should be written as 'rich dark brown' — vague 'Black' may produce inconsistent results. Italic subset of the quote ('feel grounded and perform my best') is the single best testimonial move in the library — always preserve in overlay spec.
